howItWorks.intro: This dew point calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Magnus Formula
rules.explanation: Approximation using temperature and relative humidity.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: The temperature at which air becomes saturated and moisture condenses.

faq.q: Why is dew point better than humidity?
faq.a: Dew point gives a more absolute measure of moisture — 65°F+ feels uncomfortable regardless of temp.
